name: yyc3-api-proxy
description: YYC³ AI Family - Local API Proxy Server (Browser ↔ PostgreSQL 15)

scripts.db:create: createdb -U postgres yyc3_family && psql -U postgres -d yyc3_family -c "CREATE ROLE yyc3_admin WITH LOGIN PASSWORD 'yyc3_secure_2024';" && psql -U postgres -d yyc3_family -c "GRANT ALL PRIVILEGES ON DATABASE yyc3_family TO yyc3_admin;"
scripts.db:reset: psql -U postgres -c "DROP DATABASE IF EXISTS yyc3_family;" && npm run db:create && npm run db:init:super
scripts.db:verify: psql -U yyc3_admin -d yyc3_family -c "SELECT table_name FROM information_schema.tables WHERE table_schema = 'public' ORDER BY table_name;"
scripts.db:stats: psql -U yyc3_admin -d yyc3_family -c "SELECT schemaname, relname, n_live_tup FROM pg_stat_user_tables ORDER BY n_live_tup DESC;"
scripts.setup: npm install && npm run env:init && echo '=== Setup complete. Next: npm run db:create && npm run db:init && npm run dev ==='
